params.name: The City of God
params.description:
On Oct 10, 413 AD, Saint Augustine completed this religious masterpiece.
The City of God is a book written by Saint Augustine of the Roman Empire. It is comprised of twenty-two volumes, and is divided into two main parts. The first part is a refutation of attacks against Christianity by people who blamed it for the decline of the Roman Empire. The second part depicts the history of Christianity and explains the difference between the City of God and the earthly city, and teaches people the di …
